name: Hummus Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the drained garbanzo beans in a blender.
2. Add garlic, tahini, cumin, salt, and lemon juice to the blender.
3. Gradually add water until the mixture is almost covered by the beans.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Pour the hummus into a serving dish.
6. Drizzle a thin layer of olive oil on top and sprinkle with parsley.
7. Serve with pita bread.
